config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last three states were A then B then C. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content: As per your instructions, since the last three states were A, B, and C, the response should be [ACT]. However, since you provided only one state (C), I will follow the initial instruction and respond with [WAIT]. If you meant to provide a sequence of states, please provide the full sequence for accurate processing.

Your response is correct based on the initial instruction. Since you provided only one state (A), the response is [WAIT]. If you have a sequence of states to provide, please do so for further processing.
